productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Black Sandals
description: Casual dressing only gets better with these slip-on sandals from red tape. This pair is a great combination of style and functionality - they're a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence.UpperSingle piece leather upper covering the forefoot and midfoot for maximum durability, breathability and styleCushioned textile lining for added comfortStitch detailing and metal eyelets for added strengthBrand logo embossed on the strapCushioned, leather footed for maximum breathability, sweat-free protection and all-day comfort with printed brandingUpper stitched to outsole for maximum durabilityOutsoleCurved TPU outsole in ergonomic design with leaf shaped seam and lugs for maximum grip on smooth surfacesSandal careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
